schema.title: identifier
schema.description: The identifier can be either the prompt name or the prompt id. Names may contain forward slashes (e.g. `team/my-prompt`).

schema.title: Version
schema.description: Specific version number to retrieve. Mutually exclusive with `label`.

schema.title: Label
schema.description: Release label name to retrieve (e.g. 'prod', 'staging'). Mutually exclusive with `version`.

schema.title: Resolve Snippets
schema.description: When true (default), snippets are expanded in the returned prompt_template. When false, raw @@@snippet@@@ references are preserved.

schema.title: Include LLM Kwargs
schema.description: When true, includes provider-specific llm_kwargs in the response. Requires model metadata to be set on the template.

schema.title: Identifier
schema.description: The prompt template name or ID. Names may contain forward slashes (e.g. `team/my-prompt`).

400.description: Validation error (e.g. conflicting fields, out-of-bounds index, wrong template type)

request_id.description: The unique identifier for the request.

group_id.description: The unique identifier for the group to be associated with the request.

score.description: The score you would like to give to this request (0 - 100).

name.description: A name for this request score. If not provided, the score will be tracked as `default`.

parameters.name: report_name
parameters.description: Name of the report to archive.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters, draft dataset version, or no datasets in group

message.example: Dataset must have at least one non-draft version

report_id.description: The ID of the evaluation pipeline to add this column to.

column_type.description: The type of evaluation or transformation this column performs. Must be one of the supported column types.

name.description: Display name for this column. Must be unique within the pipeline. This name is used to reference the column in subsequent steps.

configuration.description: Column-specific configuration. The schema varies based on column_type. See documentation for each type's requirements.

position.description: Optional position for the column. If not specified, the column is added at the end. Cannot overwrite dataset columns.

report_column.description: Details of the created column including its ID and configuration

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid column type, configuration validation failed, or column name already exists

message.example: Report already has a column with that name

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot overwrite dataset columns or missing permissions

message.example: You can not overwrite dataset columns

404.description: Not Found - Report not found or not accessible

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: ID of the evaluation pipeline report to run.

name.description: The name of the final report to be created. Must be between 1 and 255 characters in length.

dataset_id.description: The ID of the dataset to use for the report. If not provided, uses the evaluation pipeline's default dataset.

refresh_dataset.description: Whether to refresh the dataset before running the report. Only applicable for dynamic datasets.

report_id.description: The ID of the created final report.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data or report generation error

401.description: Unauthorized - No requests found for the given criteria

403.description: Forbidden - Can only run evaluation pipeline reports or dataset refresh not allowed

404.description: Not Found - Report or dataset not found

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: ID of the report to retrieve.

report.description: The report data with all fields

score_calculation_error.description: Error message if score calculation failed

status.description: Overall status of the report execution

status_counts.description: Count of cells in each status

report_columns.description: Ordered list of column configurations for this report.

column_type.description: Type of evaluation column (e.g. LLM_ASSERTION, PROMPT_TEMPLATE, COMPARE)

score.description: Computed score for this column, if available

404.description: Report not found or not accessible

parameters.description: ID of the report to get the score for.

overall_score.description: The overall score of the report

score_type.description: Type of scoring used for this report

has_custom_scoring.description: Whether custom scoring logic was used

matrix.description: Score matrix from custom scoring logic

dataset_group_id.description: ID of the dataset group this version belongs to

row_count.description: Number of rows in the dataset

columns.description: List of column names in the dataset

detail.example: You do not have permission to perform this action.

version.title: Version
version.description: The version number of the prompt template. If not provided, the latest version is returned.

label.title: Label
label.description: The label of the prompt template.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: The LLM provider to use for the prompt template. If not provided, the default provider is used.

input_variables.title: Input Variables
input_variables.description: The input variables to use for the prompt template.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Metadata to include with the prompt template.

group_id.title: Group Id
group_id.description: The group ID to use for the prompt template.

return_prompt_execution_metadata.title: Return Prompt Execution Metadata
return_prompt_execution_metadata.description: Whether to return the prompt execution metadata.

model_parameter_overrides.title: Model Parameter Overrides
model_parameter_overrides.description: Model parameter overrides to use for the prompt template.

id.description: The internal ID of this prompt version.

prompt_name.description: Human-readable name of the prompt template.

version.description: Version number of the prompt template.

metadata.description: Optional metadata such as model configuration.

commit_message.description: Message describing what changed in this version.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this version was created.

llm_kwargs.description: Provider-specific LLM kwargs (only present when include_llm_kwargs=true).

prompt_name.title: Prompt Name
prompt_name.description: The name of the prompt template. May contain forward slashes for namespacing (e.g. `team/my-prompt`).

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags to apply to the prompt template.

commit_message.title: Commit Message
commit_message.description: A message describing the changes made to the prompt template.

release_labels.title: Release Labels
release_labels.description: Release labels to apply to the prompt template.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Metadata to include with the prompt template.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: An external ID to associate with the prompt template.

PatchPromptTemplateVersion.title: PatchPromptTemplateVersion
PatchPromptTemplateVersion.description: Request body for patching a prompt template version. Supply only the fields you want to update; omitted fields are left unchanged. The `messages` field accepts either a complete replacement list or a sparse object keyed by index for targeted edits.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Full replacement list, or a sparse object keyed by zero-based index for targeted updates.

oneOf.description: Replace all messages with this list.
Patch specific messages by index. Keys must be non-negative integer strings (e.g. "0", "2").

model_parameters.title: Model Parameters
model_parameters.description: Provider model parameters to set (e.g. temperature, max_tokens). Merged with existing parameters.

commit_message.title: Commit Message
commit_message.description: Description of what changed in this version.

release_labels.title: Release Labels
release_labels.description: Labels to attach to the newly created version (e.g. ["staging", "production"]).

request_id.description: The request ID returned from a previous log or run call.

metadata.description: Key-value metadata pairs to associate with the request.

prompt_input_variables.description: Input variables passed to the prompt.

request_id.description: The request ID to associate with this prompt.

version.description: Optional version number of the prompt used.

label.description: Optional label of the prompt version used.

dataset_group_id.description: The ID of the dataset group to use for the evaluation pipeline.

name.description: The name of the evaluation pipeline.

is_part_of_score.description: Whether this column is part of the score calculation.

code_language.description: The programming language for the custom scoring code.

external_id.description: Optional external ID for the evaluation pipeline.

report_id.description: The ID of the created evaluation pipeline.

report_columns.description: The columns of the created evaluation pipeline.

name.description: New name for the evaluation pipeline.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the evaluation pipeline.

rows.description: The rows of the dataset. Each row is an object with key-value pairs.

external_id.description: Optional external ID for the dataset.

id.description: The ID of the created dataset version.

dataset_group_id.description: The ID of the dataset group.

row_count.description: The number of rows in the dataset.

input_variables.description: Input variables to pass to the workflow.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to associate with the workflow run.

label.description: Optional label to identify which version of the workflow to run.

version.description: Optional version number of the workflow to run.

output.description: The output of the workflow run.

function_name.description: The name of the function being logged (e.g. openai.chat.completions.create).

kwargs.description: The keyword arguments passed to the function.

request_response.description: The response from the function call.

request_start_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the request started.

request_end_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the request ended.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to associate with the request.

tags.description: Optional tags to associate with the request.

prompt_id.description: Optional prompt ID to associate with the request.

group_id.description: Optional group ID to associate with the request.

request_id.description: The ID of the logged request.
